Madrid Monitor

 
 

International Trademark
 

1248225- Hennessy PARADIS
 
Trademark Holder Registration Date Expiration Date Nice classes
Société Jas Hennessy & Co.
19.02.2015
19.02.2035
21, 32, 33
Printed : 10/03/2011
2026-02-12
  • Summary
  • Designation Status
  • Transaction History
540
Mark
151
Date of the registration
19.02.2015
180
Expected expiration date of the registration/renewal
19.02.2035
732
Name and address of the holder of the registration
Société Jas Hennessy & Co.
rue de la Richonne
F-16100 Cognac (FR)
812
Contracting State or Contracting Organization in the territory of which the holder has a real and effective industrial or commercial establishment
FR
842
Legal nature of the holder (legal entity) and State, and, where applicable, territory within that State where the legal entity is organized
Société anonyme, France
740
Name and address of the representative
Baker & McKenzie
1 rue Paul Baudry
F-75008 Paris (FR)
550
Indication relating to the nature or kind of mark
Three-dimensional mark 
531
International Classification of the Figurative Elements of Marks (Vienna Classification) - VCL(7)
19.07.01 ; 29.01.12
511
International Classification of Goods and Services for the Purposes of the Registration of Marks (Nice Classification) - NCL(10-2015)
21

Utensils and containers for household or kitchen use; bottles of glass, porcelain and earthenware; boxes, bowls, dishes, pots, saucers, cups of glass, porcelain and earthenware; cups of paper or plastic materials; drinking glasses; boxes of glass, porcelain and earthenware; decanters; cocktail stirrers; manual mixers (shakers); glass stoppers; ice buckets; ice molds; corkscrews; crystal (glassware); painted glassware; pipettes (wine tasters); menu card holders; bottle openers; pitchers; spouts; bottle pourers; wine bottle baskets; trays for domestic use, not of precious metal; tableware not of precious metal; dishes and plates of glass, porcelain and earthenware; perfume burners; perfume vaporizers; statues or figurines (statuettes) made of porcelain, terracotta or glass; unworked or semi-worked glass (except building glass); ornaments and decorative articles made of glass, porcelain and earthenware, namely: candy boxes, candlesticks, bowls, flower-pot covers, knife rests for the table, napkin rings, vases and flasks.

Ustensiles et récipients pour le ménage ou la cuisine; bouteilles en verre, en porcelaine et en faïence; boîtes, bols, plats, pots, soucoupes, tasses en verre, porcelaine et faïence; gobelets en carton ou en matières plastiques; verres à boire; boîtes en verre, porcelaine et faïence; carafes; bâtonnets pour cocktails; mélangeurs manuels (shakers); bouchons de verre; seaux à glace; moules à glaçons; tire-bouchons; cristaux (verrerie); verre peint; tâte-vin (pipettes); porte-carte de menus; ouvre-bouteilles; cruches; becs verseurs; bouchons verseurs; paniers à bouteilles de vin; plateaux à usage domestique non en métaux précieux; vaisselle non en métaux précieux; assiettes et plats en verre, porcelaine et faïence; brûle-parfums; vaporisateurs à parfum; statues ou figurines (statuettes) en porcelaine, en terre cuite ou en verre; verre brut ou mi-ouvré (à l'exception du verre de construction); articles décoratifs et décorations en verre, porcelaine et faïence, à savoir: bonbonnières, bougeoirs, boules, cache-pot, porte-couteaux pour la table, ronds de serviettes, flacons et vases.

Utensilios y recipientes para uso doméstico y culinario; botellas de cristal, porcelana y loza; cajas, boles, fuentes, vasijas, platillos, tazas de cristal, porcelana y loza; cubiletes de papel o de materias plásticas; vasos para beber; cajas de cristal, porcelana y loza; decantadores; agitadores de cóctel; mezcladores manuales (cocteleras); tapones de vidrio; cubiteras; moldes para cubitos de hielo; sacacorchos; artículos de cristalería; vidrio pintado; catavinos; portamenús; abrebotellas; cántaros; picos vertedores; tapones vertedores; portabotellas para botellas de vino; bandejas para uso doméstico que no sean de metales preciosos; vajillas que no sean de metales preciosos; platos y fuentes de cristal, porcelana y loza; quemadores de perfume [pebeteros]; vaporizadores de perfume; estatuas o figuras (estatuillas) de porcelana, cerámica o vidrio; vidrio en bruto o semielaborado (excepto vidrio de construcción); artículos de decoración y adornos de cristal, porcelana y loza, a saber, bomboneras, candelabros, bolas, cubremacetas, portacuchillos de mesa, servilleteros de aro, frascos y jarrones.

32

Beers; mineral and aerated waters and other non-alcoholic beverages; fruit beverages and fruit juices; syrups and other preparations for making beverages.

Bières; eaux minérales et gazeuses et autres boissons non alcooliques; boissons de fruits et jus de fruits; sirops et autres préparations pour faire des boissons.

Cervezas; aguas minerales, aguas gaseosas y otras bebidas sin alcohol; bebidas de frutas y zumos de frutas; siropes y otras preparaciones para elaborar bebidas.

33

Alcoholic beverages (except beers); alcoholic cocktails.

Boissons alcoolisées (à l'exception des bières); cocktails alcoolisés.

Bebidas alcohólicas (excepto cervezas); cócteles con alcohol.

821
Basic application
FR, 24.12.2014, 14 4 144 517
300
Data relating to priority under the Paris Convention and other data relating to registration of the mark in the country of origin

FR, 24.12.2014, 14 4 144 517

27.10.2016
Statement indicating the goods and services for which protection of the mark is granted under Rule 18ter(2)(ii), KR  : 24.11.2016, 2016/46 Gaz 
151
Date of the registration
19.02.2015
180
Expected expiration date of the registration/renewal
19.02.2035
833
Interested Contracting Party(ies)
KR
450
Publication number and date
2016/46 Gaz, 24.11.2016 
 
Goods and services for which protection of the mark is granted
21

Containers for household and kitchen use; kitchen utensils; utensils for household purposes; glass bottles for beverages ; porcelain bottles for beverages ; earthenware bottles for beverages; boxes, bowls, dishes, pots, saucers, cups of glass, porcelain and earthenware; cups of paper or plastic materials; drinking glasses; boxes of glass, porcelain and earthenware; decanters; cocktail stirrers; manual mixers (shakers); glass stoppers; ice buckets; ice molds; corkscrews; crystal (glassware); painted glassware; pipettes (wine tasters); menu card holders; bottle openers; pitchers; spouts; bottle pourers; wine bottle baskets; trays for domestic use, not of precious metal; tableware not of precious metal; dishes and plates of glass, porcelain and earthenware; perfume burners; perfume vaporizers; statues or figurines (statuettes) made of porcelain, terracotta or glass; unworked or semi-worked glass (except building glass); ornaments and decorative articles made of glass, porcelain and earthenware, namely: candy boxes, candlesticks, bowls, flower-pot covers, knife rests for the table, napkin rings, vases and flasks.

Récipients pour le ménage et la cuisine; ustensiles de cuisine; ustensiles de ménage; bouteilles en verre pour boissons ; porcelaine bouteilles à boissons ; faïence bouteilles à boissons; boîtes, bols, plats, pots, soucoupes, coupes en verre, porcelaine et faïence; gobelets en papier ou en matières plastiques; verres à boissons; boîtes en verre, porcelaine et faïence; carafes; bâtonnets pour cocktails; mélangeurs manuels (shakers); bouchons de verre; seaux à glace; moules à glaçons; tire-bouchons; cristal (articles de verrerie); articles de verrerie peints; taste-vins (pipettes); porte-menus; ouvre-bouteilles; brocs; becs verseurs; verseurs pour bouteilles; paniers-verseurs à vin; plateaux à usage domestique autres qu'en métaux précieux; vaisselle non en métaux précieux; plats et assiettes en verre, porcelaine et faïence; brûle-parfums; vaporisateurs à parfum; statues ou figurines (statuettes) en porcelaine, en terre cuite ou en verre; verre brut ou mi-ouvré (à l'exception du verre de construction); ornements et articles décoratifs en verre, porcelaine et faïence, à savoir : bonbonnières, chandeliers, bols, cache-pot non en papier, porte-couteaux pour la table, ronds de serviettes, vases et flacons.

Recipientes para uso doméstico y culinario; utensilios de cocina; utensilios para uso doméstico; botellas de vidrio para bebidas ; porcelana botellas para bebidas ; loza botellas para bebidas; cajas, boles, platos, cacharros, platillos, tazas de vidrio, porcelana y loza; tazas de papel o de materias plásticas; vasos para beber; cajas de vidrio, porcelana y loza; decantadores; agitadores de cóctel; mezcladores manuales (cocteleras); tapones de vidrio; cubiteras; cubiteras; sacacorchos; artículos de cristalería; cristal pintado; pipetas (catavinos); portamenús; abrebotellas; jarros; pitorros; vertedores para botellas; cestas para botellas de vino; bandejas para uso doméstico, que no sean de metales preciosos; vajilla que no sea de metales preciosos; platos y bandejas de vidrio, porcelana y loza; pebeteros; vaporizadores de perfume; estatuas o figuritas (estatuillas) de porcelana, terracota o vidrio; vidrio en bruto o semielaborado (excepto vidrio de construcción); adornos y artículos decorativos de vidrio, porcelana y loza, a saber, bomboneras, candeleros, fuentes, tapas de olla de flores, portacuchillos para la mesa, servilleteros de aro, jarrones y frascos.

32

Beers; mineral and aerated waters and other non-alcoholic beverages; fruit beverages and fruit juices; syrups and other preparations for making beverages.

Bières; eaux minérales et gazéifiées et autres produits à boire sans alcool; produits à boire aux fruits et jus de fruits; sirops et autres préparations pour la fabrication de produits à boire.

Cervezas; aguas minerales, aguas gaseosas y otras bebidas sin alcohol; bebidas de frutas y zumos de frutas; siropes y otras preparaciones para elaborar bebidas.

33

Alcoholic beverages (except beers); alcoholic cocktails.

Produits à boire alcoolisés (à l'exception de bières); cocktails alcoolisés.

Bebidas alcohólicas (excepto cerveza); cócteles con alcohol.

580
Date of notification
24.11.2016
 
Date of receipt by the International Bureau
04.11.2016
Statement of grant of protection made under Rule 18ter(1), TM  : 15.12.2016, 2016/49 Gaz 
151
Date of the registration
19.02.2015
180
Expected expiration date of the registration/renewal
19.02.2035

19.02.2035

RU
450
Publication number and date
2016/53 Gaz, 12.01.2017 
 
Goods and services for which protection of the mark is granted
33

Alcoholic beverages (except beers); alcoholic cocktails.

Boissons alcoolisées (à l'exception des bières); cocktails alcoolisés.

Bebidas alcohólicas (excepto cervezas); cócteles con alcohol.

Goods and services for which protection of the mark is granted
21

Bottles of glass.

Bouteilles en verre.

Botellas de vidrio.

Accepted for all the goods in classes 32 and 33.

JP
450
Publication number and date
2017/23 Gaz, 22.06.2017 
 
Goods and services for which protection of the mark is granted
21

Cups of paper or plastic materials; drinking glasses; decanters; pitchers; spouts; dishes and plates of glass, porcelain and earthenware; unworked or semi-worked glass (except building glass); ornaments and decorative articles made of glass, porcelain and earthenware, namely: candy boxes, candlesticks.

Gobelets en papier ou en matières plastiques; verres à boissons; carafes; brocs; becs verseurs; plats et assiettes en verre, porcelaine et faïence; verre brut ou mi-ouvré (à l'exception du verre de construction); ornements et articles décoratifs en verre, porcelaine et faïence, à savoir : bonbonnières, chandeliers.

Vasos de papel o de materias plásticas; vasos para beber; decantadores; jarros; pitorros; platos y bandejas de vidrio, porcelana y loza; vidrio en bruto o semielaborado (excepto vidrio de construcción); adornos y artículos decorativos de vidrio, porcelana y loza, a saber, bomboneras, candeleros.

Accepted for all the goods and/or services in classes 32 and 33.  
580
Date of notification
22.06.2017
 
Date of receipt by the International Bureau
01.06.2017
Statement indicating the goods and services for which protection of the mark is granted under Rule 18ter(2)(ii), MX  : 19.10.2017, 2017/40 Gaz 
151
Date of the registration
19.02.2015
180
Expected expiration date of the registration/renewal
19.02.2035
833
Interested Contracting Party(ies)
MX
450
Publication number and date
2017/40 Gaz, 19.10.2017 
 
Goods and services for which protection of the mark is granted
21

Household and kitchen utensils and containers; bottles of glass, porcelain and earthenware; non-metallic chests, bowls, dishes (tableware), pots, saucers, cups of glass, porcelain and earthenware; cups of paper or plastic (mugs); drinking glasses; boxes of glass, porcelain and earthenware; decanters; cocktail stirrers; mixers, manual [cocktail shakers); glass stoppers; ice buckets; ice cube molds; corkscrews; glassware; painted glassware; pipettes [wine-tasters]; menu card holders; bottle openers; jugs; spouts; pouring stoppers; wine bottle cradles; trays for domestic purposes, not of precious metal; tableware not of precious metal; dishes (tableware) of glass, porcelain and earthenware; perfume burners [ perfume ]; perfume vaporizers; statues or figurines (statuettes) of porcelain, ceramic or glass; unworked or semi-worked glass (except building glass); decorations and ornaments made of glass, porcelain and earthenware, namely boxes for sweetmeats, candlesticks, balls, flowerpot covers, knife rests for the table, napkin rings, flasks and vases.

Ustensiles et récipients pour le ménage ou la cuisine; bouteilles en verre, porcelaine et faïence; caisses non métalliques, bols, plats, vaisselle), pots, soucoupes, tasses en verre, porcelaine et faïence; gobelets en papier ou en matières plastiques (verres à boire); verres pour boissons; boîtes en verre, porcelaine et faïence; carafes; agitateurs à cocktail; mélangeurs manuels [shakers); bouchons en verre; seaux à glace; moules à glaçons; tire-bouchons; articles de verrerie; verre peint; tâte-vin (pipettes); porte-cartes de menus; ouvre-bouteilles; cruches; becs verseurs; bouchons verseurs; porte-bouteilles de vin; plateaux à usage domestique non en métaux précieux; vaisselle non en métaux précieux; plats et assiettes (vaisselle) en verre, porcelaine et faïence; brûle-parfum [brûle-parfums]; vaporisateurs à parfum; statues ou figurines (statuettes) en porcelaine, en céramique ou en verre; verre brut ou mi-ouvré (à l'exception du verre de construction); articles de décoration et objets décoratifs en verre, porcelaine et faïence, à savoir bonbonnières, bougeoirs, boules et cache-pots, porte-couteaux pour la table, ronds de serviettes, flacons et vases.

Utensilios y recipientes para uso doméstico y culinario; botellas de cristal, porcelana y loza; cajas no metálicas, boles, fuentes (vajillas), vasijas, platillos, tazas de cristal, porcelana y loza; cubiletes de papel o de materias plásticas (copas para beber); vasos para beber; cajas de cristal, porcelana y loza; decantadores; agitadores de cóctel; mezcladores manuales (cocteleras); tapones de vidrio; cubiteras; moldes para cubitos de hielo; sacacorchos; artículos de cristalería; vidrio pintado; catavinos; portamenús; abrebotellas; cántaros; picos vertedores; tapones vertedores; portabotellas para botellas de vino; bandejas para uso doméstico que no sean de metales preciosos; vajillas que no sean de metales preciosos; platos y fuentes (vajillas) de cristal, porcelana y loza; quemadores de perfume [pebeteros]; vaporizadores de perfume; estatuas o figuras (estatuillas) de porcelana, cerámica o vidrio; vidrio en bruto o semielaborado (excepto vidrio de construcción); artículos de decoración y adornos de cristal, porcelana y loza, a saber, bomboneras, candelabros, bolas, cubremacetas, portacuchillos de mesa, servilleteros de aro, frascos y jarrones.

32

Beers; mineral and aerated waters and other non-alcoholic beverages; fruit beverages and fruit juices; syrups and other preparations for making beverages.

Bières; eaux minérales, eaux gazeuses et autres boissons sans alcool; boissons aux fruits et jus de fruits; sirops et autres préparations pour la confection de boissons.

Cervezas; aguas minerales, aguas gaseosas y otras bebidas sin alcohol; bebidas de frutas y zumos de frutas; siropes y otras preparaciones para elaborar bebidas.

33

Alcoholic beverages (except beers); alcoholic cocktails.

Boissons alcoolisées (à l'exception des bières); cocktails alcoolisés.

Bebidas alcohólicas (excepto cervezas); cócteles con alcohol.

580
Date of notification
19.10.2017
 
Date of receipt by the International Bureau
13.09.2017

International Trademark
 

Disclaimer: The registration of a mark in the International Register does not imply the expression of any opinion whatsoever on the part of the International Bureau of WIPO concerning the substance of the entitlement claim under the Madrid Protocol and its Regulations, or of the legal status of any country, territory, city or area or of its authorities, or concerning the delimitation of its frontiers or boundaries.
